features: Modaleo Men’s aftershave Eau De Toilette Spray for him Men Perfume 100ml
An oriental fragrance with a strong personality, yet surprisingly fresh scent. High quality real perfume with a pleasant, sweet smell which persists over time.
Modaleo Each bottle is a 100 ml/3.3 fl oz Spray EDT Eau De Toilette and is new, comes in their own individual boxes and is fully sealed.
Modaleo the scent of success! This designer Men's Aftershave is the expression of every man's fantasies, a taste for money, sparkling cars, games and pretty girls
modaleo it is sexy, is a fragrance which offers a nonconformist view of masculinity… a reassuring fragrance with an extremely modern trail
Alcohol denat , Aqua Parfum , Hydrogenated castor Oil , coumarin , Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone , Hydroxycitronellal, linalool , limonene , activated polydimethylsiloxane. light alcohol it can use vegans
description: Product Description A Nonconformist View of Masculinity Modaleo - The Scent of Success Discover Modaleo, a captivating fragrance that combines an oriental essence with a surprisingly fresh scent. Crafted with high-quality ingredients, this Eau De Toilette offers a pleasant, sweet aroma that lingers over time.
